set.from: [ id: stores[0].productStoreId, hostName: hostName, obsidianName: stores[0].profileUrlPath, ]

iterate.script: websiteContent.add([path: page.pagePath, title: title, text: "x", contentType: contentType, seqId: page.sequenceNum])

service.description: update the website information except for webcontent text and images exclude delete
get the content, text and images from the website

return.message: Could not find product store for path: ${path} and orgPartyId: $companyPartyId
Could not find text page with path: ${path}

set.from: [path: pages[0].pagePath, title: title, description: description, text: contentText, contentType: contentType, seqId: pages[0].sequenceNum]

return.message: Could not find image with path: ${path}

if.script: def dbres = ec.entity.find('moqui.resource.DbResource') .condition('parentResourceId', topResourceContent[0].resourceId) .condition('filename', content.path + fileExt) .useCache(false).one() if (dbres) { def dbrf = ec.entity.find('moqui.resource.DbResourceFile') .condition('resourceId', dbres.resourceId) .useCache(false).one() if (dbrf) newPublishedVersionName = dbrf.versionName }

service-call.name: create#moqui.resource.DbResourceFile
service-call.in-map: [resourceId: resourceId, mimeType: mimeType, versionName: '01', rootVersionName: '01', fileData: content.text]

service-call.name: growerp.100.ImageServices100.upload#Image
service-call.in-map: [type: 'productStore', id: stores[0].productStoreId, description: content.title, base64: content.image]

service.description: upload an obsidian vault in zip format
Get a single or all website lead-capture forms of the company

iterate.script: fields.add([fieldId: formField.fieldId, sequenceNum: formField.sequenceNum, label: formField.label, fieldType: formField.fieldType, isRequired: formField.isRequired])

webForms.add([formId: form.formId, pseudoId: form.pseudoId, formName: form.formName, title: form.title, submitLabel: form.submitLabel, successMessage: form.successMessage, emailSequenceId: form.emailSequenceId, submissionCount: submissionCount, fields: fields])

service.description: Create a website lead-capture form with its fields

service-call.name: create#growerp.website.WebsiteForm
service-call.in-map: [pseudoId: webForm.pseudoId, ownerPartyId: companyPartyId, productStoreId: stores ? stores[0].productStoreId : null, formName: webForm.formName, title: webForm.title, submitLabel: webForm.submitLabel, successMessage: webForm.successMessage, emailSequenceId: webForm.emailSequenceId, createdDate: ec.user.nowTimestamp]

service-call.name: create#growerp.website.WebsiteFormField
service-call.in-map: [formId: formId, fieldId: field.fieldId ?: ('F' + (webForm.fields.indexOf(field) + 1)), sequenceNum: field.sequenceNum ?: (webForm.fields.indexOf(field) + 1), label: field.label, fieldType: field.fieldType ?: 'text', isRequired: field.isRequired ?: 'N']

service.description: Update a website form; the fields list replaces all existing fields

service-call.name: create#growerp.website.WebsiteFormField
service-call.in-map: [formId: webForm.formId, fieldId: field.fieldId ?: ('F' + (webForm.fields.indexOf(field) + 1)), sequenceNum: field.sequenceNum ?: (webForm.fields.indexOf(field) + 1), label: field.label, fieldType: field.fieldType ?: 'text', isRequired: field.isRequired ?: 'N']

service.description: Delete a website form with its fields and submissions
Public form definition for rendering on the generated website

iterate.script: fields.add([fieldId: formField.fieldId, sequenceNum: formField.sequenceNum, label: formField.label, fieldType: formField.fieldType, isRequired: formField.isRequired])

set.from: [formId: form.formId, title: form.title, submitLabel: form.submitLabel ?: 'Send', successMessage: form.successMessage ?: 'Thank you!', fields: fields]

service.description: Public endpoint for website lead-capture forms. Creates (or reuses) a Lead user for the submitted email address, owned by the website's company, and records the submission. No authentication required.

actions.script: Map values = [:] try { values = new groovy.json.JsonSlurper().parseText(valuesJson) } catch (Exception e) { /* invalid json handled below */ } context.values = values String email = null String name = null formFields.each { String v = values[it.fieldId]?.toString()?.trim() if (it.fieldType == 'email' && !email && v) email = v if (it.fieldType == 'text' && !name && v) name = v } context.email = email context.visitorName = name ?: (email && email.contains('@') ? email.substring(0, email.indexOf('@')) : 'website')

field-map.from: [ firstName: visitorName, lastName: 'website', email: email, role: 'Lead', userGroupId: 'GROWERP_M_LEAD', ]

service-call.name: create#growerp.website.WebsiteFormSubmission
service-call.in-map: [formId: formId, ownerPartyId: ownerPartyId, partyId: visitorPartyId, submittedDate: ec.user.nowTimestamp, valuesJson: valuesJson]

service-call.name: growerp.100.NurtureServices100.enroll#EmailSequence
service-call.in-map: [emailSequenceId: form.emailSequenceId, emailAddress: email, firstName: visitorName, partyId: visitorPartyId]

service-call.name: org.moqui.impl.EmailServices.send#EmailTemplate
service-call.in-map: [emailTemplateId: 'NOTIFICATION', toAddresses: admins[0].emailAddress, bodyParameters: [ title: 'New website form submission on form: ' + (form.formName ?: form.formId) + ' from: ' + email, topic: 'WebsiteForm', type: 'info', sentDate: ec.user.nowTimestamp]]
